---
subtitle: "Mapping Stakeholder Interactions Across the Innovation Ecosystem"
abstract: |
  This chapter converts the canvas from Chapter 4 into stakeholder alignment journeys and system sequence diagrams (rendered code in @sec-app-mermaid).
keywords:
  - service design
  - meta-journey mapping
  - stakeholder interaction
  - API/data exchange
---

# Service Design & Ecosystem Meta Journeys {#sec-service-design-meta-journeys}

A canvas block only becomes useful once it is walked through as a journey: who hands data to whom, where a human has to sign off, and where the exchange can be machine-to-machine. This chapter turns Chapter 4's canvas into exactly that -- a set of stakeholder alignment journeys and system sequence diagrams that Appendix B renders as executable Mermaid code.

## Stakeholder Interaction Vectors
- Government, industry, and academia touchpoints; who owns which handoff.

## API and Data Exchange Nodes
- Where the meta-journey requires machine-to-machine exchange versus human sign-off.

## Sequence Modeling of Institutional Workflows
- Reading and adapting the Mermaid sequence diagram in @sec-app-mermaid (Section B.2) for a new institutional context.

::: {.callout-tip title="Bridge to Chapter 6"}
Chapter 6 stress-tests these journeys against real de-risking cases using the Safe and Sustainable by Design (SSbD) matrix.
:::
